_comment: SEPI Version Template — Copy this file, rename it, and fill in the values below.
_comment_naming: File name should match the 'name' field, e.g. v4_my_method.json
_comment_structure: Two structures are supported: pillar-based (v1/v2 style) and conflict-weighted flat (v3 style). Delete the section you do not need from each country block.
name: vN_SHORT_NAME

countries._comment_countries: Add one block per country. Each country can use EITHER the pillar-based structure OR the conflict-weighted flat structure — not both.

COUNTRY_KEY._comment_pillar: --- PILLAR-BASED structure (used with arithmetic / pca aggregation) ---
COUNTRY_KEY._comment_flat: --- CONFLICT-WEIGHTED FLAT structure (used with conflict_weighted aggregation) ---
